EmailTemplate.name: Experience Cloud: Headless Registration Verification Email
EmailTemplate.subject: Verify your identity in {!Community.Name}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Confirm your registration
Hello {!HeadlessAuth.FirstName} {!HeadlessAuth.LastName},
Enter this one-time password where prompted to confirm {!HeadlessAuth.Username} in {!Community.Name}:
{!Verification.Code}
Thanks, Team FIMBY
Family In My Backyard
